verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Whisper a prayer in the morning, Whisper a prayer at noon, Whisper a prayer in the evening, To keep your heart in tune.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: God answers prayer in the morning, God answers prayer at noon, God answers prayer in the evening, So keep your heart in tune.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Jesus may come in the morning, Jesus may come at noon, Jesus may come in the evening, So keep your heart in tune.
